title: Senior Software Engineer - Freshworks Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Freshworks Ventures Solutions - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
